attacks.name: Gooey Thread
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Send Flowers
attacks.text: Search your deck for an Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Grass Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Regal Command
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Pokémon in play.

attacks.name: Solar Coiling
attacks.text: If Rosa's Encouragement is in your discard pile, this attack does 150 more damage.

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Grand Wing
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Your opponent shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If they put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, they draw 4 cards.

attacks.name: Blow Through
attacks.text: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Feather Shot
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Decidueye ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Sniper's Eye
abilities.text: If your opponent has exactly 4 cards in their hand, ignore all Colorless Energy in the costs of attacks used by this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crushing Arrow
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Sky Hunt
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

name: Salazzle ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Nasty Plot
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Dire Nails
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned and Poisoned. Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Shell Spikes
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), discard an Energy from the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Heat Breath
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 more damage.

abilities.name: Wash Out
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may use this Ability. Move a Water Energy from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

name: Mega Starmie ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Jetting Blow
attacks.text: This attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Nebula Beam
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Lapras ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Hydro Turn
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon. Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Icy Wind
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

abilities.name: Tundra Wall
abilities.text: All of your Pokémon that have any Water Energy attached take 50 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance). The effect of Tundra Wall doesn't stack.

attacks.name: Freezing Chill
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't use attacks.

attacks.name: Powerful Steam
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 90 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

abilities.name: Fighting Roar
abilities.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this Pokémon can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.

attacks.name: Incessant Onslaught
attacks.text: This attack does 70 damage for each Prize card you have taken.

attacks.name: Strong Volt
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tail Generator
attacks.text: Choose Basic Lightning Energy cards from your discard pile up to the amount of Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon and attach them to your Lightning Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Follow Me
attacks.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

name: Mega Clefable ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Luminous Wing
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of your opponent's Pokémon's Abilities done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shooting Moons
attacks.text: You may discard up to 4 Energy cards from your hand, and this attack does 40 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Double Eater
attacks.text: Discard up to 2 Energy cards from your hand, and this attack does 60 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Nap
attacks.text: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Perplex
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sweet Scent
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Scent Collection
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Psychic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Draining Kiss
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Obliterating Nose
attacks.text: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sand Attack
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

attacks.name: Twister Spewing
attacks.text: If you played Tarragon from your hand during this turn, discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Rock Tumble
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Screw Knuckle
attacks.text: Put an Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.

attacks.name: Double Draw
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

abilities.name: Stone Arms
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Attach a Basic Fighting Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Fighting Pokémon.

attacks.name: Get Angry
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Tyrannically Gutsy
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, it gets +150 HP.

attacks.name: Wreak Havoc
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Vengeful Kick
attacks.text: If your Benched Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Mega Zygarde ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Gaia Wave
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Nullifying Zero
attacks.text: For each of your opponent's Pokémon, flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 150 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Haunt
attacks.text: Place 3 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Infinite Shadow
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, put it into your hand instead of the discard pile. (Discard all attached cards.)

attacks.name: Mind Jack
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Poison Jab
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Hazardous Tail
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 70 damage to itself. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned.

name: Yveltal ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Soul Destroyer
attacks.text: Knock Out each of your opponent's Pokémon that has 50 HP or less remaining.

attacks.name: Dark Strike
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Dark Strike.

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.text: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rising Blade
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Mega Skarmory ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Sonic Ripper
attacks.text: Shuffle all Energy attached to this Pokémon into your deck, and this attack does 220 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Weaponized Swords
attacks.text: Reveal any number of Honedge, Doublade, and Aegislash from your hand, and this attack does 60 damage for each card you revealed in this way.

attacks.name: Metal Slash
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.

attacks.name: Memory Lock
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't use that attack.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Scrape Off
attacks.text: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Retaliatory Incisors
attacks.text: This attack does 40 damage for each damage counter on all of your Benched Rattata.

name: Meowth ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Last-Ditch Catch
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. You can't use more than 1 Ability that has "Last-Ditch" in its name each turn.

attacks.name: Tuck Tail
attacks.text: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.

attacks.name: Gormandizer
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. Search your deck for an amount of Basic Energy up to the number of heads and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Collapse
attacks.text: This Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Chirp
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Pokémon with Fighting Resistance, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Hand Trim
attacks.text: Discard random cards from your opponent's hand until they have 5 cards in their hand.

name: Antique Jaw Fossil
rules: Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic Colorless Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat.  At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

abilities.name: Intimidating Jaw
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, attacks used by your opponent's Active Pokémon do 30 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Antique Sail Fossil
rules: Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic Colorless Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat.  At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

abilities.name: Protective Sail
abilities.text: Whenever your opponent plays a Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to this Pokémon.

name: Core Memory
rules: The Mega Zygarde ex this card is attached to can use the attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack.)
You may attach any number of Pokémon Tools to your Pokémon during your turn. You may attach only 1 Pokémon Tool to each Pokémon, and it stays attached.

attacks.name: Geobuster
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Crushing Hammer
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Energy Search
rules: Search your deck for a Basic Energy card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Energy Swatter
rules: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you choose an Energy card you find there and put it on the bottom of their deck.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Hole-Digging Shovel
rules: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Jacinthe
rules: Heal 150 damage from 1 of your Psychic Pokémon.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Judge
rules: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Lumiose City
rules: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto their Bench. Then, that player shuffles their deck. If a player searches their deck in this way, their turn ends.
You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can’t be played.

name: Lumiose Galette
rules: Heal 20 damage and remove a Special Condition from your Active Pokémon.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Naveen
rules: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. Before drawing cards, you may discard any number of cards from your hand. (If you can't draw any cards in this way, you can't use this card.)
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Poké Ball
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Poké Pad
rules: Search your deck for a Pokémon that doesn't have a Rule Box, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Pokémon Catcher
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Potion
rules: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Rosa's Encouragement
rules: You can use this card only if you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent.  Attach up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Stage 2 Pokémon.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Tarragon
rules: Put up to 4 in any combination of Fighting Pokémon and Basic Fighting Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Growing Grass Energy
rules: As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides Grass Energy. The Grass Pokémon this card is attached to gets +20 HP.

name: Rocky Fighting Energy
rules: As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides Fighting Energy. Prevent all effects of attacks used by your opponent's Pokémon done to the Fighting Pokémon this card is attached to. (Existing effects are not removed. Damage is not an effect.)

name: Telepathic Psychic Energy
rules: As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides Psychic Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to a Psychic Pokémon, search your deck for up to 2 Basic Psychic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.
